LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUICATION AS FOLLOWS: GRANT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF MUST PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND COMPLIES WITH CCP 437C(G) AND CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REYES F. HUNTER, CSR#6576, EMAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG. [302]

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjuication
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjuication as follows: Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff must prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and complies with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
